attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race moves rather than early breakaways. Bridges to select groups in final phases when tactical situations open, showing strong positioning awareness and timing.
team_tactics: Willingness to freelance when team leaders are dropped or out of contention. Acts as secondary option, capitalizing on fluid race situations rather than pre-planned setups.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preference, though capable of operating in hilly stage race finales requiring tactical acumen over pure climbing.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent clear identification of weaknesses. May lack explosiveness for pure summit finishes given focus on bonus seconds and late bridging rather than winning.
key_patterns: Positions himself for bonus seconds and minor placings rather than stage wins (2 instances)
Bridges to front groups late in stages when opportunities arise (2 instances)
Races opportunistically for team rather than purely supporting designated leaders (2 instances)
Active in final circuits/finales rather than early breakaway attempts (2 instances)
form_trajectory: unknown: observations span 2018-2020 with insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
